zh.lifeSummary: 當Andreas Rudolph Schumacher於1693年出生在法國阿爾薩斯巴-爾可利布格時，他的父親Johann Georg Schumacher19歲，母親Anna Maria Barbara21歲。他於1727年與Elizabeth Cloninger在法國阿爾薩斯巴-爾可利布格結婚。他們至少是10個兒子和1個女兒的父母。他去世於1767年8月2日在美國馬里蘭州弗雷德里克享年74歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Andreas Rudolph Schumacher于1693年出生在法国阿爾薩斯巴-爾可利布格时，他的父亲Johann Georg Schumacher19岁，母亲Anna Maria Barbara21岁。他于1727年与Elizabeth Cloninger在法国阿爾薩斯巴-爾可利布格结婚。他们至少是10个儿子和1个女儿的父母。他去世于1767年8月2日在美国马里兰州弗雷德里克享年74岁。

nameMeanings.name: Schumacher
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  German Kurt, Hans, Otto, Bernd, Klaus, Alois, Erwin, Fritz, Horst, Juergen, Bernhard, Ewald.

German and Jewish (Ashkenazic): occupational name for a shoemaker, from Middle High German schuoch ‘shoe’, German Schuh + an agent derivative of machen ‘to make’. This surname is also found in Denmark and Sweden.

variants.name: Schuhmacher
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  German Inge, Juergen.
German and Jewish (Ashkenazic): variant of   Schumacher  .

variants.name: Shumake
meanings: Altered form of German Schumach, a variant of Schumacher .

nameMeanings.name: Andreas
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: The original New Testament Greek form of   Andrew  , used in the English-speaking world as a learned variant.

variants.name: Andries
meanings: The original New Testament Greek form of   Andrew  , used in the English-speaking world as a learned variant.

nameMeanings.name: Rudolph
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: From a Latinized version, Rudolphus, of the Germanic name Hrōdwulf ( see Rolf ). It was introduced to the English-speaking world from Germany in the 19th century. Rudolf was a hereditary name among the Habsburgs, the Holy Roman Emperors and rulers of Austria, from the Emperor Rudolf I ( 1218–91 ) to the Archduke Rudolf , Crown Prince of Austria-Hungary, who died in mysterious circumstances at his country house at Meyerling in 1889 . Rudolf Rassendyll was the central character of Anthony Hope's adventure stories The Prisoner of Zenda ( 1894 ) and Rupert of Hentzau ( 1898 ), in which he is an English gentleman who bears a great physical resemblance to the King of Ruritania, to whom he is distantly related. He successfully impersonates the king for reasons of state. In the early 20th century the popularity of this name was further enhanced by the American silent-film actor Rudolph Valentino ( 1895–1926 ), born in Italy as Rodolfo di Valentina d'Antonguolla . It has not been used much in recent times, perhaps being inextricably associated with ‘the red-nosed reindeer’ of the Christmas song.

historicEvents.title: French Monarchy
historicEvents.description: The French monarchy started way before the 1700s, but for the most part the major events of history took place during this time before the French Revolution started. This was known as the Bourbon Dynasty. Louis XIV the Great, Louis XV the Beloved, Louis XVI the Restorer of French Liberty, and Louis XVII all reigned during this time.
Historical Boundaries  1748: Frederick, Maryland Colony, British Colonial America  1776: Frederick, Maryland, United States

en.lifeSummary: When Andreas Rudolph Schumacher was born in 1693, in Cleebourg, Bas-Rhin, Alsace, France, his father, Johann Georg Schumacher, was 19 and his mother, Anna Maria Barbara, was 21. He married Elizabeth Cloninger in 1727, in Cleebourg, Bas-Rhin, Alsace, France. They were the parents of at least 10 sons and 1 daughter. He died on 2 August 1767, in Frederick, Maryland, United States, at the age of 74.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Andreas Rudolph Schumacher est né en 1693, à Cleebourg, Bas-Rhin, Alsace, France, son père, Johann Georg Schumacher, avait 19 ans et sa mère, Anna Maria Barbara, avait 21 ans. Il a épousé Elizabeth Cloninger en 1727, à Cleebourg, Bas-Rhin, Alsace, France. Ils ont eu au moins 10 fils et 1 fille. Il est décédé le 2 août 1767, à Frederick, Maryland, États-Unis, à l’âge de 74 ans.

Lui sposato Elizabeth Cloninger nel 1727, nel Cleebourg, Bas-Rhin, Alsace, Francia. Erano genitori di almeno 10 figli e 1 figlia. ko.lifeSummary: Andreas Rudolph Schumacher(이)가 1693년 프랑스 알사스 바스-히 클리보우르그에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Johann Georg Schumacher(은)는 19세였고, 그의 어머니 Anna Maria Barbara(은)는 21세였다. 그는 1727년 프랑스 알사스 바스-히 클리보우르그에서 Elizabeth Cloninger(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 열 명의 아들과 한 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1767년 8월 2일 미국 메릴랜드 주 프레더릭크에서 74세의 나이로 사망했다.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Andreas Rudolph Schumacher родился в 1693 г. в местности клибург, бас-рин, алсеис, Франция, его отцу по имени Johann Georg Schumacher было 19 лет, а матери, которую звали Anna Maria Barbara, 21. Он женился на женщине по имени Elizabeth Cloninger в 1727 г. в местности клибург, бас-рин, алсеис, Франция. У них было по крайней мере 10 сыновей и 1 дочь. Он умер 2 августа 1767 г. в местности фредирикк, Мэриленд, Соединенные штаты в возрасте 74 лет.
